acquisition method: data dependent mode using a Top 3 strategy
cleavage agent: addition of 20 µL Trypsin Gold (0.01 µG·µL−1, Promega, Charbonnières-les-Bains, France)
fractionation method: subjected to a short (5-min) migration on NuPAGE 4–12% Bis-Tris gel.
instrument: analyzed on an LTQ-Orbitrap XL (Thermo Scientific, Waltham, USA) tandem mass spectrometer.
labeling: the proteomes of the harvested cells were analyzed by tandem mass spectrometry.
reduction reagent: using 25 mM dithiothreitol in 50 mM NH4HCO3
reduction concentration: using 25 mM dithiothreitol in 50 mM NH4HCO3
